title: 7 Overlooked Tech Stocks That Could Be the Next Big Thing
text: While the new year generally delivered a sense of optimism, it's important for investors not to ignore overlooked tech stocks to buy. Of course, the broader technology space inherently commands significant attention.

title: Cognizant Technology Solutions: New Leadership, New Direction, New Growth
text: At 2.8x Price to Book and 15.1x P/E, Cognizant trades at a discount relative to the sector. Under the new leadership of Ravi Kumar, the company is well-positioned to win back the market share it lost to Infosys in the last three years.

title: Cognizant Technology Offers Tepid Outlook For 2023
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions reported Q4 2022 financial results on February 2, 2023. The firm provides an array of technology consulting and outsourcing solutions to companies worldwide.

title: Orica Selects Cognizant to Accelerate Development of a Digital Platform to Report Greenhouse Gas Emissions
text: Cognizant will implement a digital platform designed to monitor and forecast emissions in real-time, and help develop its new ESG data strategy, reporting and governance model TEANECK, N.J. , Feb. 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cognizant has extended its relationship with Orica, a leading manufacturer of commercial explosives and innovative blasting systems, to deliver an ESG data strategy and a digital platform, through agile methods, that provides real-time reporting and forecasting of scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions.

title: CTSH Stock: 3.45% Decrease Explanation
text: The stock price of Cognizant Technology Solutions Corp (NASDAQ: CTSH) fell by 3.45% in the most recent trading session. This is why.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Q4 Earnings Meet Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: Cognizant's (CTSH) fourth-quarter 2022 results benefit from strong digital revenues and acquisitions amid a challenging macro environment.

title: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (CTSH) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Tyler Scott – Vice President, Investor Relations Steve Rohleder – Chair of Cognizant's Board of Directors Ravi Kumar – Chief Executive Officer Jan Siegmund – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Ashwin Shirvaikar – Citi Tien-Tsin Huang – JP Morgan James Faucette – Morgan Stanley David Togut – Evercore Jason Kupferberg – Bank of America Operator Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to the Cognizant Technology Solutions Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. All lines have been placed on mute to prevent any background noise.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Matches Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Cognizant (CTSH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 1.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Stocks to Buy in February 2023
text: As Feb. gets underway, I'm finding under-appreciated, undervalued stocks to buy. When seeking value in the stock market the hope is that other investors will see what you see: The underappreciated value inherent in strong businesses that don't necessarily garner a lot of attention.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Cognizant's (CTSH) fourth-quarter 2022 results are expected to reflect growing domain expertise in its digital business operations despite challenging macroeconomic conditions.
